assertionSummary: Retired devLive.ts daemon file must not exist.
implementationOutcome: implemented as prohibit_retired_studio_devlive_daemon_file and removed from residual command script
notes: Direct file absence under an existing daemon directory fits TOML v1 forbidden direct-child semantics.

assertionSummary: Root package.json must not define dev:mapgen-studio.
notes: Package script JSON shape is not file-tree topology.

assertionSummary: Studio dev and serve-daemon Nx target commands, continuous flags, and dependency shape must remain correct.
notes: Nx target graph/order semantics belong to Nx or future data-driven metadata, not structure-check.

assertionSummary: App package scripts must not define retired dev aliases or watcher paths.
notes: Package script JSON semantics are not file-tree topology.

assertionSummary: Daemon and Vite config source must mention required dev port/env tokens.
notes: Required source-token presence is currentness/config validation, not a forbidden Grit diagnostic or file-tree topology.

assertionSummary: Evaluated Vite serve config must ignore generated/deploy output paths.
notes: Evaluated config behavior is not structure-check.

assertionSummary: Daemon/context source must not create, inject, expose, or shut down EventHub lifecycle.
implementationOutcome: implemented as prohibit_studio_rpc_eventhub_lifecycle_leaks and removed from residual command script
notes: Forbidden source/call/identifier shape belongs to Grit.
Positive required call presence is retained as command residual; do not encode as broad Grit absence logic.

assertionSummary: Docs site root input files must exist.
implementationOutcome: implemented as require_docs_site_root_inputs and removed from residual command script
notes: Required direct children under apps/docs and apps/docs/public fit TOML v1.

assertionSummary: docs.json must parse and expose a navigation object.
notes: Parsed JSON semantics stay out of file-tree topology.

assertionSummary: Service module and service model roots must use admitted direct children and required module root files.
implementationOutcome: implemented as validate_habitat_service_module_root_topology and removed from residual command script
notes: Direct root topology fits TOML v1; recursive suffix and router OR do not.

assertionSummary: Recursive module/model files must use accepted suffixes and modules must declare router.ts or router/.
notes: TOML v1 has no typed child checks, recursive suffix policy, or disjunctive required-child semantics.

assertionSummary: Boundary taxonomy must match workspace manifests, Nx graph metadata, and boundary config constraints.
notes: Despite its structure/check path, the oracle is graph/taxonomy consistency, not file-tree topology.

assertionSummary: Runtime stage and step order must match the contract manifest.
notes: This imports package modules and compares runtime values; not structure-check.

assertionSummary: Literal orderStandardStages keys must match the accepted stage order.
notes: Source declaration order is not file-tree topology.

assertionSummary: MapGen docs anchors, backticked references, warnings, and strictness flags must remain valid.
implementationOutcome: not converted; retained command-check with known red references
notes: Markdown shape may split to Grit later; reference target resolution and warning policy are not structure-check.

assertionSummary: Aggregate domain profile contains some file-tree fragments such as known ops-root/stage-root/module-shape checks.
implementationOutcome: not converted in this wave; requires explicit accepted scope lists and exception decisions before TOML authoring
notes: Do not preserve auto-detection/profile env behavior; split only literal topology if the next domain wave accepts exact roots.

assertionSummary: Aggregate domain profile mostly duplicates existing Grit rules or carries future source predicate cleanup branches.
implementationOutcome: not converted in this wave; retained until domain aggregate gets its own split wave
notes: Existing-rule delegations and future Grit rows are recorded in the prior domain lane; not structure-check.
